description_long: This is a heavily armored combat vehicle with a low, angular profile and a prominent turret mounted centrally on its roof. The vehicle features wide, continuous tracks on both sides for traversing rough terrain, and its hull is covered in a dark, metallic finish with visible weathering and scratches. The turret is equipped with a large main cannon and additional smaller barrels protruding from the front, suggesting multiple weapon systems. Distinct white star emblems and a circular insignia are painted on the sides, along with a pattern of white markings. The surface appears rugged and robust, with sloped armor panels designed to deflect incoming fire. The vehicle's overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing protection and firepower.
description: A dark, heavily armored tracked combat vehicle with a central turret, large cannon, and white star markings on its sides. The surface is rugged and weathered, with sloped armor and multiple weapon mounts.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide tracks, sloped frontal armor, and the main cannon protruding from the turret.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the tracks, turret, main cannon, and visible white star markings and insignia.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the turret, engine deck, and the rear armor with no visible weapon mounts.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the tracks, turret, cannon, and white star markings.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the central turret, two smaller barrels on the front hull.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped steel armor plating; no modular or reactive panels visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Dark brown and black paint with irregular weathering, white star and insignia markings; no distinct camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: White star emblems and a circular insignia on the sides of the hull.
